sanskrit:
तद्विद्धि प्रणिपातेन परिप्रश्नेन सेवया।
उपदेक्ष्यन्ति ते ज्ञानं ज्ञानिनस्तत्त्वदर्शिनः॥
transliteration:
tad viddhi praṇipātena paripraśnena sevayā
upadekṣyanti te jñānaṃ jñāninas tattva-darśinaḥ
literal_meaning: Know that (knowledge) by prostration, by questioning, by service; the knowers who have seen the truth will teach you knowledge.
contextual_meaning: Genuine transformation requires a secure attachment to a mentor who has already integrated the truth; submission, dialogue, and service create the relational safety that allows the student’s nervous system to download a new inner map.
psychological_state: Ready to move from isolated self-reliance into guided vulnerability; post-crisis openness to relational learning.
trigger_scenario: A high-achieving professional burns out, realizes self-help apps are not enough, and finally books a therapist, showing up early, taking notes, and doing the between-session homework.
anchor_text: Learn from the wise by bowing, asking, and serving.
